title: FNAF Random Jumpscares
description: This mod randomly jumpscares you on any screen using a selection of FNAF animatronics
body:

--- 
### 🎮 A Five Nights at Freddy’s Experience — In Minecraft

**FNAF Jumpscare Mod** brings the fear of *Five Nights at Freddy's* directly into Minecraft!  
Experience randomized FNAF–style jumpscares that can happen **anywhere**, even on the **main menu**.

Currently Jumpscares every 5-10 mins! 

---

### List of Jumpscares Characters

- FNAF 2 Cast: Toy Freddy, Toy Bonnie, Toy Chica, Withered Freddy, Withered Bonnie, Withered Chica, Withered Foxy,
  Withered Golden Freddy, Mangle, Puppet
- FNAF Pizza Simulator: Scraptrap, Lefty, Molten Freddy, Scrap Baby
- FNAF 3: Springtrap
- FNAF Ultimate Custom Night: DeeDee, XOR, Trash and The Gang

### Special Character abilities

- **DeeDee**: Can Spawn Random Armored Zombies in the World when she Jumpscares you.
- **XOR**: Has a Unique Jumpscare Animation based on his UCN Appearance and does the same thing as DeeDee by Spawning
  Random Armored Zombies in the World when he Jumpscares you.

---

## 👻 Features

- 🪞 **Full-Screen Jumpscares** — Animated frame-by-frame GIF-style scares
- 🔊 **Authentic Sound FX** — Real FNAF audio synced to the animation
- 🎲 **Randomized Timing** — Weighted probability system (30% chance every 60–120s)
- ⏱️ **Idle Detection** — Higher chance of being scared when AFK or in menus
- ♻️ **Non-Repeating Pool** — Each character only jumpscares once until the full list resets
- 💻 **Manual Trigger (Dev Mode)** — Press `F6` to test jumpscares instantly

---

## DISCLAIMER THE FILE SIZE IS BIG DUE TO ANIMATIONS PNGS AND OGGS
